name: Frightful Fiesta
description: Frightful Fiesta is the Halloween counterpart of Fiesta in Skylanders: SuperChargers.
biography: Several Halloweens ago, the legendary Pumpkin Pixies challenged Fiesta and his mariachi band to a duel of music in the Land of the Undead. The Pixies began with a bone-chilling tune, but Fiesta immediately followed with a spooky song of his own. On and on they played, each song more haunting than the one before it. And soon, the entire pumpkin patch was dancing. What began as a challenge had turned into the party of the year! So impressed were the Pumpkin Pixies that they used their magic to make Fiesta an honorary pumpkin for that day – and every Halloween thereafter!
personality: Frightful Fiesta is a musically talented skeleton who enjoys turning any challenge, even a musical duel, into a grand party. His skill and festive nature are enough to impress even the legendary Pumpkin Pixies.

story.content: Several Halloweens ago, the legendary Pumpkin Pixies challenged Fiesta and his mariachi band to a duel of music in the Land of the Undead. The Pixies began with a bone-chilling tune, but Fiesta immediately followed with a spooky song of his own. On and on they played, each song more haunting than the one before it. And soon, the entire pumpkin patch was dancing. What began as a challenge had turned into the party of the year! So impressed were the Pumpkin Pixies that they used their magic to make Fiesta an honorary pumpkin for that day – and every Halloween thereafter!

trivia: The black part of Frightful Fiesta's mariachi outfit is much darker than his original counterpart's only as figures.
His outfit bears a resemblance to the marching band skeleton on the album cover of 'The Black Parade' by My Chemical Romance.
His Rift Engine is colored black with the Undead icon in orange to symbolize Halloween.
Interestingly, on his promotional image of his toy packaging, his Rift Engine is silver instead.
gameplay: In Skylanders: SuperChargers Racing, Frightful Fiesta utilizes stats for Top Speed, Acceleration, Handling, Firepower, and Armour. His standard Power Stats emphasize high Luck and Agility.

basic.name: Trumpet Concord
basic.content: Fiesta plays a haunting tune on his trumpet.

basic.name: Amigos
basic.content: Fiesta summons his mariachi band amigos to assist him.

basic_upgrades.name: Take It Away Amigos!
basic_upgrades.content: Fiesta's amigos take charge in the battle.

soulgems.name: Diva
soulgems.content: A powerful musical performance that dazzles enemies.
